files.title: Platform Architecture & Dev Process
files.description: Interactive overview of the Intellilake platform: architecture decisions, monorepo structure, Git & Linear workflow, tenant configuration flow (with SaaS/Dedicated toggle), CI/CD pipeline, and sprint cycles. 6 tabbed panels with clickable diagrams and detailed callouts.

files.title: Infrastructure Explorer
files.description: Interactive Terraform architecture map: explore all 8 IaC modules (networking, EC2, DocumentDB, ALB/NLB, ECR, Secrets, Airflow ECS), environment compositions (shared, staging, production, client), the 5-phase installer flow, and client packaging/delivery process.

files.title: Hierarchy Parser Pipeline
files.description: Interactive explorer for the hierarchy parser pipeline: configure dimensions, custodians, and parsing strategies. Visualize how raw fund/entity data flows through normalization, hierarchy building, and output stages.

files.title: Bronze Pipeline Playground
files.description: Step through each Bronze preprocessing stage interactively: canonical dedup, acronym-aware title case, blank fill, modifier stripping (with collision and empty guards), and multi-parent resolution. Toggle stages, edit config, paste custom CSV data, and see exactly how rows transform.
